22.kj: how (long, oft, (-soever)), (no-) thing, what (end, good, purpose, thing), whereby(-fore, -in, -to, -with), (for) why.
22.dv: or מַה; or מָ; or מַ; also מֶה; a primitive particle;

22.kj: cease, end, fall, forbear, forsake, leave (off), let alone, rest, be unoccupied, want.

22.gl: a puff, i.e. wind, angry or vital breath, divine inspiration, intellect. or (concretely) an animal
